nasb.text: They took soundings and found it to be twenty fathoms; and a little farther on they took another sounding and found it to be fifteen fathoms.

esv.text: So they took a sounding and found twenty fathoms. A little farther on they took a sounding again and found fifteen fathoms.

cnv.text: 就探測一下，深三十六公尺；稍往前行，再探測一下，深二十七公尺。

ccb.text: 就探测水深，结果约三十六米深，再往前一点，只有二十七米左右。

csbs.text: 就测了水深，发现有三十七公尺；稍往前行，再测一测，发现有二十七公尺。
